headline: Jim Cramer Explains Why He Does Not Think “PENN Entertainment Is Going Anywhere”
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed PENN Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ:PENN) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
